opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for complex reasoning, especially across providers with varying capabilities, often reveals biases in training data far more acutely than simpler tasks—expect significant calibration effort. The “macro” element also introduces a temporal dimension; maintaining consistent context and factual grounding over weeks or months is a surprisingly difficult engineering problem, often requiring a dedicated knowledge graph and refresh strategy. It's not just about *what* the model says, but *when* it says it.
actions.reasoning: My experience with multi-provider LLM routing and tool orchestration gives me a unique perspective on the technical challenges of building an AI for geopolitical macro investing.
